news.title:
RailTel secures ₹42.6 crore order from NICSI for NKN project, set to complete by March 2027.
GAIL signs MoU with RailTel for digital infrastructure collaboration, focusing on AI and connectivity initiatives.
news.summary:
RailTel secures ₹42.6 crore order from NICSI for NKN project, set to complete by March 2027.
GAIL signs MoU with RailTel for digital infrastructure collaboration, focusing on AI and connectivity initiatives.

news.title: RailTel Corp secures work order worth ₹426.3M from National Informatics Centre Services Inc.
news.summary: RailTel Corp secures work order worth ₹426.3M from National Informatics Centre Services Inc.

news.title:
RailTel Corp received a work order from NICSI for a New Core Link under NKN Project for 12 months.
The project is set for completion by 31 Mar 2027, focusing on domestic telecom services.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp received a work order from NICSI for a New Core Link under NKN Project for 12 months.
The project is set for completion by 31 Mar 2027, focusing on domestic telecom services.

news.title:
Railtel gets orders worth ₹64 cr; stock to watch today.
Newgen Software wins ₹20.5 cr Kuwait order; Nippon AMC to sell 40% AIF stake for ₹734 cr.
news.summary:
Railtel gets orders worth ₹64 cr; stock to watch today.
Newgen Software wins ₹20.5 cr Kuwait order; Nippon AMC to sell 40% AIF stake for ₹734 cr.

news.title:
RailTel Corp awarded LOA for signaling, telecom setup at Guntur Junction.
Project includes Automatic Block Signaling, completion by Sep 4, 2027.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp awarded LOA for signaling, telecom setup at Guntur Junction.
Project includes Automatic Block Signaling, completion by Sep 4, 2027.

news.title:
IRFC and RailTel dividend record date is March 13; last day to buy is today.
IRFC offers ₹1.05/share interim dividend, RailTel ₹1/share. RailTel rose 2% today.
news.summary:
IRFC and RailTel dividend record date is March 13; last day to buy is today.
IRFC offers ₹1.05/share interim dividend, RailTel ₹1/share. RailTel rose 2% today.

news.title: RailTel Corp gets ₹115 crore intent letter from Power Grid Corp for services due by Sept 10, 2034.
news.summary: RailTel Corp gets ₹115 crore intent letter from Power Grid Corp for services due by Sept 10, 2034.

news.title:
RailTel announces ₹1/share second interim dividend; record date March 13, 2026.
Dividend payment scheduled for March 24, 2026.
news.summary:
RailTel announces ₹1/share second interim dividend; record date March 13, 2026.
Dividend payment scheduled for March 24, 2026.

news.title:
GAIL signs MoU with RailTel to advance digital infrastructure using AI, bolstering India's connectivity.
GAIL shares fell 5% to ₹147.7, marking a 14% decline in 2026 so far.
news.summary:
GAIL signs MoU with RailTel to advance digital infrastructure using AI, bolstering India's connectivity.
GAIL shares fell 5% to ₹147.7, marking a 14% decline in 2026 so far.

news.title:
RailTel Corp wins a 27 crore contract, boosting its portfolio.
The new deal strengthens RailTel's potential revenue streams.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp wins a 27 crore contract, boosting its portfolio.
The new deal strengthens RailTel's potential revenue streams.

news.title:
Tata Power partners with Salesforce for clean energy transformation; UltraTech acquires 26.2% Sunsure Solarpark stake for green energy goals.
Meesho faces ₹1,499.73 crore tax demand; RailTel, RITES, and Niraj Cement secure major orders in infrastructure projects.
news.summary:
Tata Power partners with Salesforce for clean energy transformation; UltraTech acquires 26.2% Sunsure Solarpark stake for green energy goals.
Meesho faces ₹1,499.73 crore tax demand; RailTel, RITES, and Niraj Cement secure major orders in infrastructure projects.

news.title:
RailTel Corporation secured a Rs. 26.7 crore order from South East Central Railway.
The order involves OFC supply, transportation, trenching, laying, and termination, due by March 2027.
news.summary:
RailTel Corporation secured a Rs. 26.7 crore order from South East Central Railway.
The order involves OFC supply, transportation, trenching, laying, and termination, due by March 2027.

news.title:
RailTel's board meeting on 9th March 2026 to consider 2nd interim dividend.
Trading window for RailTel shares closed from 3rd March till 48 hours post dividend declaration.
news.summary:
RailTel's board meeting on 9th March 2026 to consider 2nd interim dividend.
Trading window for RailTel shares closed from 3rd March till 48 hours post dividend declaration.

news.title:
RailTel wins work order from IIT Delhi for SITC of UG OFC projects.
The project includes 9-month OFC laying and 6-year AMC.
news.summary:
RailTel wins work order from IIT Delhi for SITC of UG OFC projects.
The project includes 9-month OFC laying and 6-year AMC.

news.title:
RailTel partners with Ashoka Buildcon to secure an LOI from Maharashtra Govt.
The project is estimated to generate Rs 1136.2 crore over five years.
news.summary:
RailTel partners with Ashoka Buildcon to secure an LOI from Maharashtra Govt.
The project is estimated to generate Rs 1136.2 crore over five years.

news.title:
RailTel, with Ashoka Buildcon, received LoI to modernize IGR and Controller of Stamps offices.
The contract period for the modernization project extends until 19 March 2032.
news.summary:
RailTel, with Ashoka Buildcon, received LoI to modernize IGR and Controller of Stamps offices.

news.title:
RailTel secures ₹35.6 cr railway signalling project from North Central Railway, to be completed by Feb 2028.
RailTel's Q3 net profit fell 4% YoY to ₹62.4 cr, while revenue rose 19% to ₹913.4 cr.
news.summary:
RailTel secures ₹35.6 cr railway signalling project from North Central Railway, to be completed by Feb 2028.
RailTel's Q3 net profit fell 4% YoY to ₹62.4 cr, while revenue rose 19% to ₹913.4 cr.

news.title:
RailTel Corp awarded order by Dy. Cste P Cnb for MSDAC and works in Pryj. Division, NCR.
Project includes indoor alterations in EI RRI PI stations, completion within 24 months.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp awarded order by Dy. Cste P Cnb for MSDAC and works in Pryj. Division, NCR.

news.title:
RailTel's credit ratings by ICRA reaffirmed: ICRA AA (Stable) for long-term and ICRA A1 for short-term facilities.
Ratings cover fund-based, non-fund based, and unallocated limits, maintaining a stable outlook.
news.summary:
RailTel's credit ratings by ICRA reaffirmed: ICRA AA (Stable) for long-term and ICRA A1 for short-term facilities.
Ratings cover fund-based, non-fund based, and unallocated limits, maintaining a stable outlook.

news.title:
RailTel wins Rs 93 crore education lab project; key stock to watch.
EPL sees 15% EBITDA growth with 20.1% margin; GMDC improves by 10%.
news.summary:
RailTel wins Rs 93 crore education lab project; key stock to watch.
